ABOUT fundsretrieve

fundsretrieve is a modern investment firm mapped out for prospective clients who would like to invest and earn passively through Forex, Crypto, Shares, Bonds and Stock trading. With years experience in offering private fund management services, financial quantitative analysis and trading risk assessment.

We focus on providing portfolio investment management expertise to investors by leveraging our diverse platform and portfolio management technology. Globally we stand transparently as one of the leading advanced proprietary digital trading firm that explore through the collaboration of highly motivated and intelligent CPT audited trading firm both in the United States & United Kingdom with a very positive reputation in the industry. Our experience enables us to understand fully the fund management needs of our customers.

Get Started

OUR MISSION

It’s our mission to create wealth for clients in the Forex & Crypto economy by providing safety in a volatile trading environment. Our recommendations have the security of long term Investment while taking advantage of short term Market swings.

Get Started


OUR VISION

At fundsretrieve, we believe investors deserve an established, trusted, and accountable partner that can help them navigate digital currency investing. That’s why we are building transparent, familiar investment products that facilitate access to this burgeoning asset, and provide the springboard to investing in the new digital currency-powered “internet of money

Get Started

Products

We have also refined our offering and introduced plenty of new products in our bid to continue giving our customers the ultimate online trading experience and to help them optimize their investment portfolio. Now, with our online marketers and trade managers using our low cost automated trade system where you are guaranteed a fixed return on a weekly basis

Cryptocurrencies

Our Services

Cryptocurrencies (Coin Offering)

Trade BTC, ETH, XRP, LTC, and EOS with 100x leverage and the lowest fees.Access global cryptocurrency markets in minutes, trading the most popular crypto-assets and tokens using the most robust tools online to generate profit and build revenue streams.

Indices

Access the most popular indices such as S&P500, FTSE100, JAPAN, and much more.Trading stock index CFDs on up to 500x leverage can be a profitable journey for new day traders or professionals alike

Forex

Go long or go short on 25 Forex majors. Take advantage of leverage up to 1000x. fundsretrieve offers the world’s most highly traded forex currencies, including USD, GBP, JPY, EUR, and many more

Forex Minning

Forex mining is the process of adding transaction records to public ledger of past transactions or blockchain.Purchase AntMiner S7, AntMiner S9, & Avalon6 and start adding transactions to your Blockchain

Cryptocurrency Investing

Cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin are digital currencies can be invested on with a weekly or monthly earning by percentage.

Commodities

Speculate on the prices of high profile commodities such as oil and gold, and profit from their growth.Commodities have been traded throughout history, and have become among the most exciting and profitable markets to trade. Gaining exposure to various commodities can help individuals grow their capital quickly and safely.

How it works

Register

Sign up on PC/Mobile with your First Name, Last name , Email & Mobile Number.

Verify & Deposit

verify with Country issued identity card and Add bitcoins to your account.

Grow Your Fund & Withdraw

Earn profits, Enter your bitcoin address, specify the amount and Withdraw.

1:100x Account Liverage

Collaborate with a dedicated trade manager/advisor who will work with you and for you, providing clear recommendations designed to help you grow and protect your wealth. You will sign up a trade account in the brokerage platform using the encrypted link provided by the advisor and you alone will have full access to your trade account so as to initiate withdrawal anytime. You will fund your trade account with your investment capital which will generate a fixed return which depends on the signal strength
